name: L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele
teaser: Roughly the same pizza as the Naples original. The interior got a nice upgrade — I just wish the pies had too.
review: The pizza at this franchise location is roughly the same as the Naples original. They use much of the same Italian ingredients, but everything is always better closer to the source (especially cheese). What did get a nice upgrade is the interior, which feels at once very Hollywood and homey. I wouldn't mind if the pies got a slight upgrade the way that the decor did.
headsUp: Marina del Rey is not where you expect great Neapolitan. Surprise.
update: Still the best Neapolitan on the Westside.
